caption: A group of men are gathered outdoors in what appears to be a press or public event. Central to the scene is Nitish Kumar, identified by on-screen text as "नीतीश कुमार, CM, बिहार," who wears a dark jacket over a white shirt. He is seen gesturing with his hands while speaking to those around him. Other men stand nearby, some in suits and others in traditional Indian attire. The frames show slight shifts in perspective and motion as the men interact and shift positions. A red banner at the top of the screen reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाक़ी है", while a blue bar on the left lists "डिप्टी CM" and "सब्रत चौधरी," and a red bar on the right lists "मंत्री" and "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार." The bottom of the screen features a scrolling news ticker starting with "PM: NDA सरकार बिहार के." Small portraits of other officials are visible on the sides, and a timestamp of "10:04 PM" appears in the corner.
